title: MiACompat
description: Enhances the Mine in Abyss server experience
body: # MiACompat Improves the quality-of-life in the Mine in Abyss server by adding proper support for Xaero's Minimap / World Map waypoints, bonfire tracking, a coordinate display and ghost seek visuals. ## Recommended mods - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Adds nutrition info to food tooltips - [Bundles Beyond](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundles-beyond) - Removes bundle item view limit ## Features - ⚙️ **Highly Customizable** - Open config with `/miacompat config` or via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - 📍 **Waypoint Layer Correction** - Waypoint positions are visually adjusted relative to your current MiA layer - Ensures waypoints render in the correct location no matter which layer you are in - 🔥 **Bonfire Tracking** - Tracks linked bonfire and shows it as a hud waypoint - Check status with `/miacompat bonfire` - 🤢 **Curse Meter** - Shows how close you are to feeling the effects of ascension - Visualizes how many times in a row you've been affected by the curse - Includes debuff information - 🗺️ **MiA Coordinates Display** - Adds a custom coordinates info display to Xaero’s Minimap HUD - Shows your position in the MiA world coordinate system - Customizable by going to Xaero's Minimap settings \ `Information Settings -> Info Display Manager` ### Ghost Seek Enhancements #### Ghost Seek Ping Breadcrumbs - Only visible when Ghost Seek is in a passive slot - Displays visual breadcrumbs at previous ghost seek ping locations - Cleared automatically after hitting a praying skeleton - Configurable duration (or set to 0 to disable) #### Ghost Seek Cooldown Bar - Shows a cooldown on your hud after getting a ping - Colored by the last ping you received #### Ghost Seek Distance Hints - Adjusts action bar messages to show distance range when receiving a ghost seek ping \ *(example: `dum tick (100-150 blocks)`)* ### Additional features with [Player Relay](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-relay) - Correctly shown in layers - Tracked players - [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) pings
